DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEHADE, NABIL DBA  THE GOOD STUFF DISTRIBUTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2011 - JUDGMENT. WILLIAM LAU APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: DOANLD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEHADE, NABIL DBA  THE GOOD STUFF DISTRIBUTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALWAREETH, FATOUM DBA  MAISA RESTAURANT $1,390.67 PRINCIPAL, $131.61 INTEREST, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,582.28, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
